title: BEM-680 check Claude response
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

search_dirs=[
 'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt',
 'governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor',
 'governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor',
 'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude'
]
items=[]
for d in search_dirs:
    p=Path(d)
    if p.exists():
        for f in sorted(p.glob('*')):
            if f.is_file():
                txt=f.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]
                items.append({'path':str(f),'size':f.stat().st_size,'mentions_bem679':'bem679' in f.name.lower() or 'bem-679' in txt.lower() or 'BEM-679' in txt,'mentions_claude_response':'response' in f.name.lower() or 'ответ' in txt.lower() or 'Claude' in txt[:500]})

responses=[x for x in items if x['mentions_bem679'] and ('claude_to_gpt' in x['path'] or 'external_auditor_to_internal_auditor' in x['path'])]
status='claude_response_found' if responses else 'no_claude_response_found_yet'
blocker=None if responses else {'code':'CLAUDE_RESPONSE_TO_BEM679_NOT_FOUND_YET','message':'No BEM-679 response from Claude found in canonical inbound mailbox lanes.'}
state={'schema_version':'check_claude_response_bem679.v1','bem':'BEM-680','status':status,'responses':responses,'all_mailbox_items':items[-20:],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:47 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem680_check_claude_response_bem679.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem680_check_claude_response_bem679.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-680 | Check Claude Response To BEM-679 | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:47 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem680_check_claude_response_bem679','cycle_id':'bem680-check-claude-response-bem679','source':'gpt_monitor','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:47 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem680_check_claude_response_bem679']={'status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['claude_response_bem679_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 19:47 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem680_check_claude_response_bem679.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-680: '+status+' responses_found='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked canonical mailbox lanes for Claude response to BEM-679 infrastructure protocol')
"""
No issue comments.
